overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character exploring snowy mountain ruins at night. The character walks through narrow rocky passages, jumps down to lower areas, explores a courtyard with dead wolves, and climbs a stone wall to reach an ancient ruined courtyard with icicles.

large boulders covered in snow flanking the path

wooden ladder leaning against the stone structure
snow-covered evergreen trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky mountain path flanked by snow-covered boulders. Ahead stands an ancient stone tower with wooden scaffolding, while snow falls gently in the dim night light.

segments.scene_description: The character jumps down from a ledge into a lower snowy area, landing near a dead wolf. Wooden scaffolding becomes visible against the stone ruins as the character surveys the new area.

segments.scene_description: The character explores the lower courtyard, walking past dead wolves and examining the ancient stone walls and broken wooden barricades. Snow continues to fall as the character surveys the area.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and begins climbing a vertical stone wall, using handholds and ledges to ascend. The camera follows the climb closely as the character makes their way upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruined courtyard with icicles and broken archways

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the wall and enters a wide ruined courtyard. Long icicles hang from the ancient stone structures as snow falls, and a large broken archway stands ahead leading deeper into the mountain ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a desolate mountain pass that descends into a grim courtyard before ascending toward an ancient ruined plaza. It begins with the character navigating a narrow rocky path flanked by snow-covered boulders and a distant stone tower under a dim night sky. As the character jumps from a ledge into a lower snowy area, the scene shifts to a bleak courtyard littered with dead wolves and broken wooden barricades. The camera then follows closely as the character climbs a vertical stone wall, using handholds to ascend from the depths of the ruins. Finally, the movement culminates as the character reaches the top of the wall and enters a wide courtyard where long icicles hang from stone structures and a large broken archway leads deeper into the mountains.
